programme.title: Abilene Town
programme.desc: Abilene Town

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Corvette Summer
programme.desc: High school graduate Kenneth W Dantley Junior and Vanessa a hooker-in-training try to track down his custom-made newly-stolen Corvette

programme.title: Prodigal Boxer 2
programme.desc: Prodigal Boxer 2

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Phantom Rancher
programme.desc: Cowboy puts on a black mask and a black outfit to fight a gang of land-grabbing crooks

programme.title: Savage Guns
programme.desc: In Sonora in a lonesome valley near the border of Arizona ex-major Summer tries to forget about the horrors of the war of independence on his farm He has foresworn to violence His intention is put to the test when a gang of villains ravages the small town

programme.title: Shot At Dawn WW1
programme.desc: Shot At Dawn WW1

programme.title: Shot At Dawn WW1
programme.desc: This touching documentary investigates the tragic stories of the 306 British Commonwealth soldiers shot for acts of cowardice and desertion during World War One

programme.title: 13 Hours That Saved Britain
programme.desc: 13 Hours That Saved Britain explores the events of a single day 15th September 1940 - the day Churchill described as the crux of the battle a day that is now celebrated as Battle of Britain Day Dramatic colour film footage of aerial combat combined with contemporary interviews will illustrate that the events of seventy years ago still resonate with a new generation

programme.title: Battlefield Vietnam 2
programme.desc: Part 2 The Undeclared War

programme.title: Cities At War - Berlin
programme.desc: Berlin - The Doomed City Berlin was under air attack throughout the war - from the British and the Americans and then the Russians

programme.title: The USS Enterprise and the Battle of Midway
programme.desc: After expanding the war in the Pacific to include western outposts the Japanese Empire had attained its initial strategic goals quickly taking British Hong Kong the Philippines British Malaya Singapore and the Dutch East Indies modern Indonesia The Dutch East Indies with its vital oil resources was particularly important to Japan Because of this preliminary planning for the second phase of operations commenced as early as January 1942

programme.title: Tornado Down Operation Desert Storm
programme.desc: Operation Desert Storm was only a day old when Tornado pilots John Peters and John Nichol were shot down in Iraqi territory and subsequently tortured and paraded on TV Bruised and battered the two men mumbled incoherently into the camera and instantly became symbols around the world of Saddam’s savagery and aggression In Tornado Down the two pilots break their silence and in a series of moving and candid interviews reveal the physical and psychological torment they suffered at the hands of their captors; the brutal torture sessions; the elation of their release; and their determination not to crack in the face of such cruelty and humiliation

programme.title: Hell in the Pacific Pt3
programme.desc: The war in the Pacific was not just between Japan and America; it was also Britains forgotten war and one of the dirtiest conflicts in living memory Hell in the Pacific is a revisionist examination of that conflict tracing the use of horrific torture and propaganda not only by the Japanese but controversially by the Americans and the Allies as well Included are are previously unheard eye-witness accounts and stories of American troops collecting noses ears and skulls as trophies

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: An escaped convict Marc Alaimo returns home to retrieve the money he hid from a bank robbery and discovers his son is bitter and his wife Sheree North has lost her mind Later a couple Chris Nash Ruth de Sosa illegally adopts a baby but as the little girl Irina Cashen grows her new parents come to the realization that she may be evil

programme.title: Tales from Crypt
programme.desc: In a research lab when two colleagues accidentally inject an experimental virus into their sleazy boss that will eventually kill him he tries to get revenge on them believing it was no accident

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: Danny Darwin learns that his new tattoo might be more than just a tattoo

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Lovely young invalid Meg Kinderly has to fend for herself after she gets trapped in her spacious family mansion with a vicious killer who has just wiped out most of her family and all of the servants But things arent that simple

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Reverend Nolan Powers is a fire and brimstone evangelist who has achieved tremendous fame wealth and power from his radio program thats broadcast on a national basis from his station WGOD A team of TV journalists do a story on Powers and his increasing popularity with the masses However a long-suppressed shameful secret from his dark family past threatens to destroy Powers and his current high profile status

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: While working as a grounds keeper on a large estate owned by a kindly old lady she is brutally murdered in her own home Both her granddaughter and granddaughters husband implicate Eric But Eric knows he didnt do it and knows who did

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric is kidnapped by a corrupt Southern politician who is dying of cancer and wants Eric to cure him and make him immortal by turning him into a werewolf

programme.title: Forever Knight
programme.desc: The death of a model recalls for Nick his own infatuation with a beautiful ballerina one hundred years ago

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: Ryan and Micki disguise themselves as monks to retrieve a mysterious pen kept in an ancient monastery

programme.title: Dark Night of the Scarecrow
programme.desc: In a small Southern town four vigilantes wrongfully execute a mentally-challenged man but after the court sets them free mysterious accidents begin to kill them off one by one

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: Gilligan moves to the other side of the island when the other castaways suddenly become allergic to him

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: Gilligan finds sunflower seeds on the island that gives him the ability to read minds and when the fellow castaways find out they want in on the action

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Pepino feels his job is threatened when Grampa takes on another hired hand

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Grampa wants nothing to do with his wealthy new neighbors

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Max becomes a drunken jobless bum so that KAOS will recruit him

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Buildings are being blown up in Washington by paintings that include explosives

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: Its a three-ring circus for BJ and the Bear when theyre made monkeys in the middle between a shady circus promoter nasty gangsters and a daredevil motorcycle stunt woman with a heart of gold

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Carol brings a French Poodle home from the pound and Mister Ed plans to get rid of Pierre as soon as possible

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Wilbur tries everything from hypnosis to psychiatry in order to cure Ed of his fear of heights

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: In a plot to get to an airplane with a silent engine Hogan gets Klink to believe that he is psychic

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: An African prince comes to Stalag 13 who is negotiating with the Germans for the rights in his country to build a submarine base and Hogan replaces him with Kinchloe

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: When a Combat Photographer is assigned to the 73 to get some footage of the Crew in action Gruber borrows his movie camera to use in a money-making scheme Then when complications develop McHale and The Boys must work up a plan to avoid trouble for both themselves and the Photographer

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: McHale and The Boys scheme to get rid of a troublesome new member of the 73 Crew and in the process wind up in big trouble But the new Crewman - Who happens to be the spitting-image of Binghamton - Turns out to be quite useful in a complicated plan to get them off the hook

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Gomer and his fellow Marines are headed into town on day passes when one of them is stuck on guard duty Gomer volunteers to help his buddys wife take care of things for the baby - but Sgt Carter volunteers to drive them around leaving his date on hold

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: While hitching a ride to town Gomer stops to help a stranded motorist she takes him into town to meet her mother A robber is holding up liquor stores while wearing a Marines uniform at the same time

programme.title: Vega
programme.desc: Call girl Lexy Gardner is shot dead so her mother hires Dan to find out who did it and how Lexy wound up hooking The case expands to involve singer Eddie Banning tennis pro Lou Spitz and contractor William Virgil

programme.title: Hart to Hart
programme.desc: Jennifer and Jonathan go undercover to identify a toy plan thief who has become a murderer

programme.title: Newhart
programme.desc: George tries to fix the towns bell tower after a big snowstorm and Michael rents The Wizard of Oz to overcome his fear of wind

programme.title: Newhart
programme.desc: Dick attempts to help Joanna overcome her fear of eye doctors

programme.title: Major Dad
programme.desc: A closure committee is coming to inspect the base to determine possible closure and worried about what may happen General Craig orders the staff to kiss up to them

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: A bank robber comes to the island to hide from the authorities and holds the castaways prisoner while he waits for his boat after his cover is blown

programme.title: Baywatch Nights
programme.desc: Johnny Larkin a brutal convict escapes from prison and vows to kill everyone associated with his arrest and conviction including Garner

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Lou takes his new guys on their very first repo but when the debtors attack with chainsaws Ronnie and Carlos are left to fend for themselves

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Lou plans an elaborate sting operation to infiltrate a cult but everything goes awry when the new guys arent prepared and Matt is left picking up the pieces

programme.title: What A Way To Go
programme.desc: A four-time widow discusses her four marriages in which all of her husbands became incredibly rich and died prematurely because of their drive to be rich

programme.title: The Dukes Hazzard
programme.desc: Boss gets Uncle Jesse to enter a contest for a new type of fossil fuel saying that moonshine is the perfect way to cut down on pollution However Boss has more up his sleeve He plans to tip off the authorities and once Jesse is arrested take credit for the idea himself

programme.title: Hercules 207
programme.desc: Hercules 207

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: Dr Belmans daughter does human testing on herself with an accelerant that causes her to rapidly evolve Joshua Doors decides somebody should run against President Thompson in the election somebody who will stand up to the Taelons

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: The Morthren have finally learned the identities of the Blackwood team They use it to their advantage by creating doubles framing them for an armed bank robbery where several people were shot dead Malzor impersonates a city police officer and joins in the manhunt

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: A young loner who believes he is a vampire is accused of murdering his mothers boyfriend

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: After seemingly having no interest for so many episodes what happened to Jim Tressa is suddenly in Peru and sidetracked by a voice from her past on a radio

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: A wandering energy force inhabits the body of Alpha technician Anton Zoref turning him into an energy absorbing being

programme.title: Highlander II The Quickening
programme.desc: In this sci-fifantasy sequel Connor MacLeod Christopher Lambert has become an elderly man after losing his immortality Living in a bleak future where the world is protected from solar radiation by a massive shield MacLeod regains his youth when he kills two assassins from his home planet This results in an ongoing battle with the villainous and powerful Gen Katana Michael Ironside but MacLeod receives help when the noble Juan Ramirez Sean Connery returns

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Young 322
programme.desc: Young 322

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: Two Gunsmoke writers teamed on this modern-day Western set at a rodeo in San Franciscos Cow Palace A bronc rider dies in what appears to be an accident A rodeo clown looks around the scene after the police leave and discovers the riders rope -- which was cut almost halfway through before it broke leaving the bronc free to throw him The police come back to investigate the scene and before long the chief suspect is also murdered in another accident

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: The Impossible Missions Force mixes dinner and danger at a crime czars private party Jack Wellman has arranged the deaths of four Government officials so he can fill the vacancies with men he controls

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Dragnet

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: A known extortionist claims he is innocent of recent charges Gannon and Friday interrogate him about different incidents and then bring out a surprise device which proves his guilt

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: The Fugitive

programme.title: Big Valley
programme.desc: The Barkleys refuse to cooperate with the Mexican authorities but with the Generals help plan to go to Rio Blanco Mexico and break Heath out of jail Meanwhile Heath has his own break-out plan and succeeds-but is betrayed

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: Cheyenne is escorting a bride and 5000 to his boss He meets a friend who works now for the railroad who tells Cheyenne a group of young bandits are robbing trains They strike the train but their goal is more than robbing it

programme.title: Lets Go Thailand Motorcycle Adventures Ep 015
programme.desc: Lets Go Thailand Motorcycle Adventures Ep 015

programme.title: Lets Go Thailand Sights and Sounds Ep 010
programme.desc: Lets Go Thailand Sights and Sounds Ep 010

programme.desc: Lets Go Thailand Sights and Sounds Ep 018

programme.title: Spirits of Bruce Lee
programme.desc: Spirits of Bruce Lee

programme.title: Wo ist Worrawit
programme.desc: Wo ist Worrawit

programme.title: Win Lose Forgive
programme.desc: Win Lose Forgive

programme.title: Chopping Mall
programme.desc: A group of young shopping mall employees stay behind for a late night party in one of the stores When the mall goes on lock-down before they can get out the robot security system malfunctions and goes on a killing spree

programme.title: The Tommyknockers
programme.desc: The small town of Haven becomes a hot-bed of inventions all run by a strange green power device The whole town is digging something up in the woods and only an alcoholic poet can discover the secret of the Tommyknockers

programme.title: Conquest of the Planet of the Apes
programme.desc: Following a North American pandemic from a space-borne disease that wiped out all dogs and cats in 1983 the government has become a series of Schutzstaffel-patterned police states that took chimpanzees gorillas and orangutans as pets before establishing a culture based on ape slave labor These events were foretold in 1973 as testimony by two chimpanzee scientists who came from the distant future Cornelius and Zira before they were killed Widely believed to be dead their baby was secretly raised by the circus owner Armando as a young horseback rider In 1991 now fully grown and named Caesar the ape is brought to one of the cities to distribute flyers for Armandos circus During their trip Armando advises Caesar not to speak in public for fear of his life

programme.title: House II The Second Story
programme.desc: A man Arye Gross and his friend Jonathan Stark exhume an ancestor Royal Dano in the house where his parents were killed

programme.title: Arena
programme.desc: In a huge space arena fighters from all over the galaxy come to battle each other in hopes of claiming victory While most warriors are of various alien species Steve Armstrong Paul Satterfield is a rarity -- a human who aspires to compete in the games Training with his friend Shorty Hamilton Camp and encouraged by the lovely promoter Quinn Claudia Christian Steve has a shot at the intergalactic championship but plenty of extraterrestrial brawlers are eager to take him down

programme.title: Lion of the Desert
programme.desc: Set during the reign of Mussolini this epic tale revolves around Libyan leader Omar Mukhtar Omar an Arab Muslim rebel takes on the Italian attack which is directed towards conquering Libya

programme.title: Mazes and Monsters
programme.desc: Four college students become immersed in fantasy role-playing games causing tragic results; based on Rona Jaffes book

programme.title: Attack Force Nam
programme.desc: A group of Australian commandos launch a secret mission against Japanese forces in World War II

programme.desc: Lovely young invalid Meg Kinderly has to fend for herself after she gets trapped in her spacious family mansion with a vicious killer who has just wiped out most of her family and all of the servants But things arent that simple

programme.desc: Reverend Nolan Powers is a fire and brimstone evangelist who has achieved tremendous fame wealth and power from his radio program thats broadcast on a national basis from his station WGOD A team of TV journalists do a story on Powers and his increasing popularity with the masses However a long-suppressed shameful secret from his dark family past threatens to destroy Powers and his current high profile status

programme.desc: The School of Hard Knocks 23 filmed at the Subway Soccer Center in Calgary. Professional and Amateur fighters from across North America battle in the cage. Cody Clarke vs. Matthew Norman; Phil Towler vs. Ryan Shanahan; Jesse Arnett vs. Mike O'Neill; Daymon Miller vs. Beau Bentley.

programme.desc: Meet the man in 1992 who helped to end the Rodney King riots

programme.desc: Sherard sits down with Carribbean superstar K Victoria Hear how shes changing the world with her music

programme.title: The Tim Hayes Interview
programme.desc: Sherard sits down with the man who has turn comedy into an art

programme.title: The Chef Felicia Grady Cooking Special
programme.desc: World renown chef Ms Felicia Grady stops by the show to cook a delicious meal for the crew

programme.title: The Heart Hayes Interview
programme.desc: Join me as I sit down with the beautiful actress Heart Hayes Hear how keeping her standards high is the only option Also in the episode I chat it up with former Supreme Susaye Green And Businessman Mr Johnboy Watts

programme.desc: Join me live on location where I chop it up with comedy icon Mr Mike Marino As well as surprise guest Mr Sean Kanan and more!

programme.desc: Join me as the lovely Empress returns to the Sherard Show as a new mother and hit maker

programme.desc: Kevin Keene and his dog Duke have been transported to Video Land and asked to help defeat Mother Brain After Princess Lana is kidnapped Kevin and his video game companions Mega-Man Kid Icarus and Simon Belmont have to work together to save her or else Mother Brain just might be able to take over Video Land and rule forever
